name: codesprite
description: CodeSprite: AI ghost text for VS Code. Inline completions, AI commands & commit messages — BYOK, open-source.

codesprite.enabled.description: Globally enable or disable all AI features.

codesprite.apiKey.description: API key for the OpenCode service. Keep this value secret.

codesprite.apiBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the OpenCode (OpenAI-compatible) chat completions endpoint.

codesprite.model.description: Model identifier to use for completions (e.g. 'gpt-4o-mini', 'gpt-4o', 'claude-3.5-sonnet'). Enter any model ID your API provider supports.

codesprite.streamEarlyStop.description: When enabled, stop reading the SSE stream as soon as the provider signals completion ([DONE] or finish_reason), which can reduce tail latency.

codesprite.inlineEnabled.description: Enable or disable inline autocomplete suggestions (ghost text while typing).

codesprite.debounceDelay.description: Delay in milliseconds before sending an inline completion request after the user stops typing. Lower values are more responsive but increase API usage.

codesprite.inlineMaxCompletionTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens the model should generate per inline completion request. Increase if you frequently get empty responses with finishReason='length'.

codesprite.inlineMaxInputTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens allowed for the inline completion prompt (prefix + suffix + system message). Context lines are automatically trimmed to fit this budget.

codesprite.inlineMaxContextLines.description: Maximum number of lines of prefix and suffix context to send with each inline completion request. The actual number sent may be lower to respect maxInputTokens.

codesprite.inlineEnabledLanguages.description: List of VS Code language IDs where inline autocomplete is active. Use ['*'] to enable for all languages, or list specific IDs like ['python', 'javascript', 'typescript'].

codesprite.commandEnabled.description: Enable or disable the AI Command modal (Ctrl+Shift+I).

codesprite.commandMaxCompletionTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens the model should generate per AI Command request. Increase if you frequently get truncated responses.

codesprite.commandMaxInputTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens allowed for the AI Command prompt (prefix + suffix + system message). Context lines are automatically trimmed to fit this budget.

codesprite.commandMaxContextLines.description: Maximum number of lines of prefix and suffix context to send with each AI Command request. The actual number sent may be lower to respect maxInputTokens.

codesprite.commandEnabledLanguages.description: List of VS Code language IDs where the AI Command modal is active. Use ['*'] to enable for all languages, or list specific IDs like ['python', 'javascript', 'typescript'].

codesprite.commitMessageEnabled.description: Enable or disable the AI commit message generator in Source Control.

codesprite.commitMaxTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens the model may generate for a commit message (16–4096).

codesprite.commitMaxDiffLength.description: Maximum characters of the git diff to send to the model. Diffs exceeding this are truncated (512–100000).
